title: YOUTH OUTREACH DROP-IN CENTER - 211info
text: YOUTH OUTREACH SERVICES YOUTH OUTREACH DROP-IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a youth center with access to academic supports, mental health supports, employment assistance, after-school activities, food such as snacks and staple items, clothing, hygiene supplies, and information and referral relating to in-house shelter services. 719 E 1st Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Ages 11-24 Hours: Drop in: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-noon Appointment only: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday noon-8pm, Wednesday 9am-8pm, (503) 472-0457 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 538-8023 Main phone (503) 550-9638 After-hours call or text Main phone (503) 472-0457 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-8pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Domino's Pizza downtown Services: General Clothing Provision * Youth Issues Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Youth Issues Mental Health Drop In Centers * Youth Issues Personal/Grooming Supplies * Youth Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Youth Issues Tutoring Services * Youth Issues Youth Centers Youth Employment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - JOBS READINESS PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - SAFE SHELTER HOUSING/SHELTER - YOUTH TRANSITIONAL LIVING PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
